translations: Both of them said Our Lord we have wronged
and have mercy (on) us surely, we will be
puzzle.hint: The supplication of our first parents, Adam and Eve, after their slip.
puzzle.arabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخَـٰسِرِينَ
puzzle.verseEn: They said, "Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers."
